question: What drove the reduction in SG&A expense as a percent of net sales in FY2023?
answer: Selected 1 PageIndex nodes and 3 scored pages for answering.

citations.section: For the Full Year of Fiscal 2022
citations.text: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the fourth quarter of fiscal 2022 were $737.9 million. Merchandise inventories, net at the end of the fourth quarter of fiscal 2022 totaled $1.6 billion compared to $1.5 billion at the end of the fourth quarter of fiscal 2021. The $104.2 million increase was primarily due to the opening of 47 new stores since January 29, 2022, inventory to support new brand launches and brand expansions, and inventory cost increases.
